retrieved_result: So What's a Ney Anyway?!? \"So What's a Ney Anyway?!? Well, first off, I should clear up the spelling matter. I have seen the word spelled 'ney', 'nye', 'nay', or 'nai'. It is acceptable to call the instrument by any of the names, but many ethnomusicologists and musicians make the distinction according to which country it is
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the Ney instrument and its spelling, not Docker or setup for beginners; not relevant to the query.

history.title: So What's a Ney Anyway?!?
history.description: "So What's a Ney Anyway?!? Well, first off, I should clear up the spelling matter. I have seen the word spelled 'ney', 'nye', 'nay', or 'nai'. It is acceptable to call the instrument by any of the names, but many ethnomusicologists and musicians make the distinction according to which country it is
